ground.what_this_is: This is the central Activity Dashboard, a live 'now-view' that shows the current state of the system and a scrolling feed of recent events.
ground.what_you_can_do: Scan the top tiles to see the system's current status (e.g., if work is pending your approval or fully resolved), and read the scrolling log below to see what actions have just happened.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the canvas header region (canvas/app/src/regions/Toolbar.tsx); adding or changing this control is a code change there, surfaced via the build-intent wire.
howto.what: The wire control on the canvas header.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click to initiate a wire connection between two nodes, translating the operator's spatial intent into a system action.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the toolbar region (Toolbar.tsx); changing the run action is a code change there.
howto.what: The run command on the activity dashboard.
howto.what_you_can_do: Execute the current composition to advance the system state.

howto.what_you_can_do: Identify the current composition kind (Content) at a glance; it is a static status indicator for the active view.
